arts.ttl: Füllkrug, Coufal and Emerson to start against Southampton
arts.sum: West Ham United: Areola, Coufal, Todibo, Kilman, Emerson, Ward-Prowse, Soler, Paquetá, Bowen ©, Kudus, Füllkrug The substitutes’ bench will be filled by Mavropanos, Scarles, 40-year-old goalkeeper Łukasz Fabiański, defender Aaron Cresswell, midfielders Guido Rodríguez, Andy Irving and Tomáš Souček, and attackers Luis Guilherme and Evan Ferguson.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils to step up Tyler Dibling pursuit on 'one key condition'
arts.sum: Manchester United will reportedly step up their interest in Southampton attacker Tyler Dibling only if one key condition is met.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot REJECTS claims Darwin Nunez was involved in training ground bust-up after under-fire star was dropped for West Ham win
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: The Uruguayan sat in the stands and was not named as a sub for the win over West Ham after gossip circulated that he had been involved in a heated scenario at training.
